recommendations.title: Incoming
recommendations.overview: Their first week of high school. The biggest party of the year. Mistakes will be made as four teenage boys navigate a night of mayhem and debauchery.

recommendations.title: Ugly Melanie
recommendations.overview: This is the story of too nice girl who one day decides to become evil. And who will find out it is not so easy to do wrong when you have always been nice.

recommendations.title: Zombeavers
recommendations.overview: College friends find their weekend of sex and debauchery ruined when deadly zombie beavers swarm their riverside cabin.

recommendations.title: Joe's Apartment
recommendations.overview: A nice guy has just moved to New York and discovers that he must share his run-down apartment with a couple thousand singing, dancing cockroaches.

recommendations.title: Plus One
recommendations.overview: Longtime single friends, Ben and Alice, agree to be each other's respective plus one at every wedding they're invited to, during a busy summer of wedding fever.

recommendations.title: In China They Eat Dogs
recommendations.overview: Arvid is an ordinary bank clerk who lives a rather unassuming life with his dear girlfriend. But his life is turned completely upside down when he bravely manages to avert a robbery against the bank where he works.

recommendations.title: Who Would You Take to a Deserted Island?
recommendations.overview: On their last night together, four longtime flatmates' lives are suddenly upended when a secret is revealed during the course of an evening celebration.

recommendations.title: Hell and Back
recommendations.overview: Two best friends set out to rescue their pal after he's accidentally dragged to hell.

recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: Manta, Manta
recommendations.overview: A not-so-clever guy called Bertie with an Opel Manta (a low-budget European sports coupé from the '80s) gets competition in a street race from a guy with a fast Mercedes, and another slick guy with a Ferrari tries to get his hands on Bertie's girlfri
